subject: Demystifying Kimi K3: The Three Algorithms Behind the #1 Frontend Coding Model
snippet:

On July 16, 2026, Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight sparse Mixture-of-Experts model with a 1-million-token context window. It is the largest open-weight model ever shipped. snippet:

important, but you must show your work.

Focus your self-study on small projects, each limited to a few
hours so that you can complete it on the weekend or over a few
nights. This will ensure you keep moving forward and don't get
stuck.

results you achieved. This will allow other people to see the
results and the value that you are capable of delivering.

subject: FBI Top Stories: Special Event Security, Part Two: How the FBI Keeps the Public Safe at Gatherings
snippet:
July 15, 2026 - Special Event Security, Part Two: How the FBI Keeps the Public Safe at Gatherings
The Bureau plays a critical role in keeping everyone safe at public gatherings defined as special events by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security. Qualifying events can be almost any kind of public gathering: parades, local fairs, music festivals, foot races, concerts, awards shows, and sporting events, just to name a few.

subject: Something shifted while you were sleeping Anthony
snippet:
==>>

Ever feel like you are being watched by something more than just
the stars?

subject: Upcoming changes to Venmo
snippet:
Upcoming changes to Venmo We're making some updates to Venmo and the Venmo 
User Agreement effective August 24, 2026.
[image: Venmo logo] 

Hi Anthony,

WeвҖҷre making some updates to Venmo and the *Venmo User Agreement* 
<https://venmo.com/legal/us-user-agreement/08182026> effective August 24, 
2026, including changes to 1) the arbitration provision in the User 
Agreement that will affect how claims you and Venmo have against each other 
are resolved; and 2) our Venmo Stash rewards program.
